---
title: tblocks tutorial
author: Detlef Groth, University of Potsdam
date: 2026-06-17 17:51
---

## Introduction

_tblocks_ is a Tcl application and Tcl package which can be used to translate
simple Markdown files into SVG graphics.

Here the typical Hello World example with the Markdown code shown above will be automatically converted to a SVG graphics:

```{.shell label=Main cmd="tblocks %i %b.svg" chunk.ext=md ext=svg}
## Hello

- entry 1
- entry 2
- entry 3

There can be as well some more text
in the lines below of the list.

## World!

- entry 4
- entry 5
- entry 6

There can be as well some more text
in the lines below of the list.
```
